---
title: 'Thankful to finally make this announcement.'
date: '2019-11-29T10:58:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: false
categories:
  - 'Announcement'
---

<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/grief-sucks-3f25cea0e66f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" data-original-height="359" data-original-width="1025" height="140" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/grief-sucks-5a534ee2688c.jpg" width="400" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><a href="https://www.griefsucks.org/p/start-here_29.html" target="_blank">GriefSucks.Org</a></td></tr>
</tbody></table>
There are many things I'm grateful for today. But it's been a long day so I won't go into everything.<br />
<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li>I'm grateful to God, for getting me through the worse 17 months of my life.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>I'm grateful to my Mom, Mom In Love, Friends, and Family who have gotten me through the worst days.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>I'm especially grateful for the Widow/Widower community I've met through the various Facebook Groups online. They have been a source of encouragement and strength.</li>
</ul>
<br />
<br />
One such Wid-Sister, <a href="https://www.griefsucks.org/p/about-us.html" target="_blank">Adrianne</a>, and I started a new project together. We both got busy this summer and I'm grateful for her patience as I promised her I'd keep with it if she kept bugging me.<br />
<br />
So I'd like to announce <a href="https://www.griefsucks.org/p/start-here_29.html" target="_blank">GriefSucks.org</a>. It's been and will continue to be a project of love that we will work on as time permits. There are some amazing articles she wrote from her perspective as a Widow and I plan to add some from my perspective as a Widower. So far, she wrote a lot and I edited a lot. I'm grateful for her talent as a writer.<br />
<br />
Please check it out and <a href="https://feedburner.google.com/fb/a/mailverify?uri=griefsucks/moHf&amp;amp;loc=en_US" target="_blank">subscribe</a>&nbsp;to that project as well!<br />
<br />
And with that short post, I wish you a fond farewell for the evening.
